required_truth_or_expected_answer: NIST HG008-T somatic small-variant v0.3 VCF plus benchmark BED
required_output: small-variant recall precision and reference-compatibility summary
caveat: Required before locking mutation-context feature extraction thresholds.

required_truth_or_expected_answer: NIST HG008-T somatic SV/CNV v0.5 VCF/BED/BEDPE benchmark materials
required_output: SV reciprocal-overlap and CNV reciprocal-overlap summaries
caveat: Required before production SV caller or allele-specific CNV outputs can feed CHORD scarHRD or HRDetect-style models.

required_truth_or_expected_answer: Sufficient validated somatic variant matrix and reconstruction QC for signature adapter thresholding
required_output: SBS matrix QC and no-call/threshold decision summary
caveat: Use as a matrix/QC known-answer gate rather than a disease-specific HRD-positive label.

required_truth_or_expected_answer: Expected BRAF V600E or documented melanoma driver context plus UV-like/SBS7 signature behavior
required_output: driver recovery and UV-signature guardrail summary
caveat: COLO829 is an independent tumor-normal benchmark and non-breast guardrail; do not treat it as an HRD-positive truth label.

required_truth_or_expected_answer: Zenodo COLO829 somatic SV truth VCF and CNA truth files
caveat: Required independent cross-check for SV and CNA pipelines before clinical interpretation.

required_truth_or_expected_answer: Expected truth-overlap and driver detection degrade monotonically as tumor purity drops
required_output: purity-level recall table and monotonicity summary
caveat: Useful stress test for sensitivity but not a plasma MRD validation substitute.
